when_to_use: Polygonal/organic modeling, UV unwrap, baking, rendering (Cycles), rigging, animation, glTF/FBX/USD export, simulation bake
gotcha: Use CYCLES not EEVEE Next (EEVEE headless broken on Windows). The -- separator is MANDATORY. Use absolute forward-slash paths in render.filepath. Call python not python3.

when_to_use: Parametric/mechanical parts, precise tolerances, CSG boolean logic, STL for 3D print, SVG profiles. Code-driven geometry with no GUI.
gotcha: Call openscad.com (console binary) NOT openscad.exe. The .com binary suppresses the GUI. Use absolute paths. Pass -D for parameter overrides: -D wall=3

when_to_use: CadQuery/build123d: Python-native parametric CAD; complex fillets, threads, assemblies. Cleaner Python API than OpenSCAD. Export to STEP or STL.
gotcha: Requires pip install cadquery or build123d. Not stdlib. cadquery version pin: >=2.4. Export: cq.exporters.export(shape, path) for STEP or STL.

when_to_use: STEP -> STL/GLB via OCC kernel. Best for CAD visualization workflows where exact B-Rep tessellation is needed. CAD roundtrip with STEP standard.
gotcha: Use FreeCADCmd.exe (headless CLI), not FreeCAD.exe. FreeCADCmd Python API differs from GUI Python. Color from STEP is OCC-dependent and often missing.

when_to_use: Batch FBX/OBJ/STL->GLB conversion at speed. No DCC startup overhead (~50ms vs Blender ~3s). Inspection and format identification. Regression dump/compare.
gotcha: assimp FBX exporter is experimental - use Blender for FBX OUTPUT. FBX 100x scale: CLI has no --global-scale flag; use Blender for scale-critical conversions. pyassimp CVE-2024-48423.

when_to_use: GLB optimization for web: Draco/Meshopt, KTX2/WebP textures, prune/dedup/weld, join/instance, draw-call reduction, Khronos spec validation. The web delivery pipeline.
gotcha: npm package only. Node LTS required (18/20/22). Sharp prebuilt may fail on corporate proxy - set sharp_binary_host mirror. toktx must be on PATH for etc1s/uastc commands.

when_to_use: Single-binary, fastest for animation + Meshopt compression. -cc compresses geometry AND animation keyframes. -tc texture compression (native binary only, not npm).
gotcha: npm version CANNOT compress textures (-tc flag silently fails). Must use native gltfpack-windows.zip binary from meshoptimizer releases for -tc. EXT_meshopt_compression not supported by all AR viewers.

when_to_use: KTX2/Basis Universal texture encoding. ETC1S for color/albedo (small file). UASTC for normal/ORM maps (high precision). Required for gltf-transform etc1s/uastc commands.
gotcha: toktx.exe must be on PATH. Install from KTX-Software GitHub releases (Windows installer). Add C:\Program Files\KTX-Software\bin to PATH. --genmipmap is mandatory for mipmapped samplers.

when_to_use: Headless Cycles render from within a Blender Python script. Turntable frames, UV checker render, normal map visualization, contact-sheet QA.
gotcha: CYCLES only on Windows headless. Set scene.render.filepath to absolute forward-slash path before render. Verify PNG exists and size > 1 KB after render.

when_to_use: Pure-stdlib scripts: file probes, CSV search, path validation, JSON reporting, batch ops without DCC. The forge-data search scripts themselves.
gotcha: Always use python not python3. Add UTF-8 stdout wrapper at script top. Open CSVs with encoding='utf-8-sig' to handle Windows BOM. Advisory scripts catch-all and exit 0.
